title: Tender Smoky British Cod Fish And Chips
description: A smoky and adventurous British dish featuring cod fish, bay leaves, and a side of crispy chips, perfect for a dinner meal. This halal-friendly recipe is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the flour, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each cod fish fillet into the flour mixture, coating evenly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the coated cod fish fillets until golden brown.
Transfer the fried cod fish fillets to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake in the oven for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, fry the potato chips in hot oil until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the potato chips on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
Serve the smoky cod fish with the crispy potato chips and a side of bay leaves.
